methods.name: CT-ICP+NDT-KF
methods.note: Hybrid keyframe correction: CT-ICP no-GT odometry is the base trajectory; NDT T1 correction is attempted every 1 frames and accepted only when correction delta is <= 0.5m / 0.35rad. accepted=102/107, rejected=5, finite-prior fallbacks=0, CT-ICP prior ATE=0.583m. Runtime is CT-ICP+NDT combined.
